_comment: Safe baseline for nq-publish.service. Install as /etc/nq/publisher.json. The loopback bind is for a same-host monitor; use a private interface address plus a firewall rule for a remote monitor.
_sqlite_wal_targets_comment: Optional. Add real local database paths only after granting the nq service user traverse/read permission on their parent directories. Empty means the probe is inert.
_helper_comment: zfs_witness and smart_witness are intentionally omitted. Add either block only after installing and testing its helper; a configured missing helper is reported as failed testimony.
